description: Style Note This kurta from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop leggings or an intricate stole. We recommend tonal ethnic flats for your feet. Product Details Yellow kurta with orange print, has a scoop neck, decorative stitch and paneling at the yoke, short sleeves and side slits Material and Care 100% cotton  Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteThis kurta from Aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details.
